headline: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) In Focus As Middle East Crisis Pushes Investors Towards Defense Sector
summary: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) is among the 8 Best Drone Stocks to Buy for the Next 3 Years. The company’s shares have surged over 22% year-to-date and are in focus as the Middle East conflict intensifies.
